title: henckelia humilis
intro: Henckelia humilis, also known as the Indian pipe plant, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and tuberculosis. Henckelia humilis can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
